title: Plasma eel
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Plasma eels''' were bioengineered grenades carried by [[Yuuzhan Vong]] strike teams.

Like the [[amphistaff]], a plasma eel was long and flexible enough, allowing it to coil around its user's waist when not in use. When uncoiled and thrown, the eel became rigid like a spear, and its head glowed with growing [[Plasma/Legends|plasma]] energy.

In flight, a plasma eel vented excess energy through its tail, adding additional thrust. Upon impact, the plasma exploded with the force of a [[Thermal detonator/Legends|thermal detonator]].

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Star by Star]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[The New Jedi Order: The Unifying Force]]''
